title: Haash'n
content:

Since {{DB|location|moncalamari|Mon Calamari (Dac)}} states that [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], the Mon Calamari homeworld, was subjugated by the Empire, this article assumes that Haash'n's homeworld was Dac.</ref>

[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Haash'n''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. After his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Subjugation of Mon Calamari|subjugated]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], motivated by a [[Dream/Legends|dream]] to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruisers]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he was stationed aboard the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']]. He stood behind several Alliance [[Alliance High Command/Legends|leaders]] as they gave a briefing on how the Rebels would attempt to [[Battle of Endor/Legends|destroy]] the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Haash'n went on to serve on ''Home One'' in the battle, which resulted in an Alliance victory.

==Biography==
The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Haash'n<ref name="CCG" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from<ref name="Dac" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="Outer Rim">[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="Dac" /> After Dac's [[Subjugation of Mon Calamari|subjugation]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="CSWE" />

[[File:Mothmaleadingbriefing.png|thumb|left|250px|Haash'n (far left) among other Rebels]]
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which include the appearance of Haash'n, to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Haash'n was aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']], [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]],<ref name="Episode VI" /> serving as a [[Major/Legends|major]].<ref name="CCG" /> He was among several Mon Calamari and [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who stood behind<ref name="Episode VI" /> [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]]<ref name="Mon">{{DB|character|monmothma|Mothma, Mon}}</ref> [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] of the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] as they briefed an audience of Rebels on how they would go about [[Battle of Endor/Legends|destroying]] the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]. After the briefing, ''Home One'' traveled to the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]],<ref name="Episode VI" /> and Haash'n served aboard the [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] in the ensuing battle.<ref name="CSWE" /> The Alliance subsequently won the engagement, destroying the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] and [[Death/Legends|killing]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="Episode VI" /> Haash'n's name meant nimble.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Haash'n had [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin.<ref name="Episode VI" /> He had a [[Dream/Legends|dream]] of [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] a [[Starship/Legends|starship]],<ref name="CSWE" /> as well as a specific, personal goal of piloting Star Cruisers, the latter of which was his motivation to join the Alliance.<ref name="CCG" />

==Skills and abilities==
Haash'n was a master [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]],<ref name="CCG" /> being known for his skills in the field.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Equipment==
Haash'n wore a beige<ref name="Episode VI" /> [[Mon Calamari Crewman uniform]].<ref name="WEG">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:HaashnBTS.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Haash'n (far left) on the set of ''Return of the Jedi'']]
Haash'n first appeared in the [[1983]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']],<ref name="Episode VI" /> where the character was portrayed by a female extra.<ref name="Rebelscum">{{Rebelscum|subdomain=forum|url=threads/rotj-history-gerald-homes-creature-info.1069050|text=ROTJ History: Gerald Home's Creature Info|author=Home, Gerald}}</ref> The scenes on ''Home One'' were filmed throughout the week of Tuesday, [[February 16]], [[1982]]. The scenes were lengthy to film due to complications with the lighting associated with the [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of the Death Star.<ref name="BTS">{{WebCite|url=https://swnz.co.nz/2017/03/11/gerald-home-tessek-squid-head-mon-calamari-officer-2|text=Gerald Home as Tessek (Squid Head) and Mon Calamari Officer|author=G., Matt|date=2004-06-11|work=[https://swnz.co.nz Star Wars New Zealand]|archiveurl=https://archive.vn/JbkiZ}}</ref>

Haash'n was first identified on a card in the ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion pack for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], released in [[2000]].<ref name="CCG" /> An [[:File:MonCalamariRegiment-SWR.png|image]] of Haash'n and other Mon Calamari from ''Return of the Jedi''<ref name="Episode VI" /> was reused to depict the [[Mon Calamari Regiment]]'s [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], albeit with the background swapped. However, no connection was made between those Mon Calamari and Haash'n.<ref name="SW:R">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>
